source: current upstream litex-boards through local toolchain passthrough patch
blocker: LitePCIe S7 PHY constraint code expects Vivado-style pre_placement_commands, which XilinxYosysNextpnrToolchain does not expose.
next_decision: Do not block DDR3 rebaseline on PCIe. Reproduce DDR3-only openXC7 first, then revisit PCIe as a separate LitePCIe/openXC7 compatibility task.
